title: Caelesti Flora
description: Caelesti Flora brings you the unique and varied plant life of Caelesti
body:
**Please Note:** Caelesti Flora does not currently include any item textures

Caelesti is an advanced resource pack, developed using Fabulously Optimised. Caelesti Flora adds the unique and varied plantlife of Caelesti, featuring custom colourmaps, varied textures, dynamic block models, and custom particles.

To stay up to date with the development of Caelesti, you can subscribe to my [YouTube channel](https://www.youtube.com/@skalibercaelesti/videos) where I frequently post updates to the pack and its' many unique and novel features.
